alerts.inventorySemantics: FWGS browser/CDP collection uses the Oracle Commerce store-location endpoint plus /ccstorex/custom/v1/b2b/get-inventory to collect pickup quantity by SKU and store. Direct server fetch is Akamai/session gated, so scheduled collection needs a browser-assisted session bootstrap.

alerts.inventorySemantics: Montgomery ABS product search/postback exposes county product rows and HAL/allocated flags. Store-level modal rows remain separate and should only alert as store inventory when extracted.
